body.title: Codify 'update levers doc on skill/capability changes' as audit check + sprint step
body.result: Added step 12.5 to sprint-ticket SKILL.md (levers-doc check) + registered levers-doc-skill-sync forever audit check
body.description:
The levers doc (lab/docs/Deterministic_AI_Development_Levers_A_layer_on_top_of_skills.md) is the single summary of how we work. Currently it's updated informally after design sessions. Codify the rule: whenever skills are edited or new capabilities added, the levers doc must be updated to reflect the change.

**Affected files:** ~/.claude/skills/sprint-ticket/SKILL.md (add teardown note), lab/claudecode/audit_runner.py or audit_add.py (register check)
**Design rules:** none — process rule
**Scope boundary:** In scope: add a note in sprint-ticket teardown Step 13 to check if the sprint changed a skill — if so, update levers doc. Register an audit_add check that detects skill files modified in the last day without a corresponding levers doc update. Out of scope: automated levers doc rewriting — the update is always human-authored (Akien) or CC-authored with Akien review.
**Test plan:** No automated tests. Done when: sprint-ticket SKILL.md Step 13 contains the levers-doc note; audit_add.py has a registered check. Verify by running audit_runner.py and seeing the check appear.
